raw_consumer_statement:

I checked and it was not true so I called the credit card company to dispute the extra charge of XXXX They told me not to worry about it and that they will issue a new card and that they will investigate and so, in XX/XX/XXXX of 2023 credit card sent me a letter saying that they had issued a credit back to my account of the XXXX from XX/XX/XXXX of 2023 and they considered this matter resolved. The other {$1900.00} and {$200.00} I paid them to my credit card company on XX/XX/XXXX XXXX, the amount I paid was {$4900.00} ( I didnt like to carry a balance so I would pay my balance in full ) .Later in XXXX of 2023 my credit card was fraudulently charged multiple times so I decided to canceXXXX the reservation and because I was unable to get a response from XXXX or the property regards my reimburse for the {$1900.00} and {$200.00} I disputed the charges. XXXX ok now according to them instead of they owning me my money they want me to pay {$4000.00} XXXX.
